selection_reason: First incomplete source-safe downstream closure item after WP1-WP5 source contracts. Runtime/loss-control neighbor state is blocked, but WP2.1 does not require runtime, DB, exchange, credential, order, Cost Gate, deploy, live, or bounded Demo outcome access.
objective: Make contract-bound quantile training require a valid pit_dataset_manifest_v1 before training can claim a contract-bound run, attach canonical PIT manifest/binding metadata to acceptance reports, and keep non-contract-bound behavior explicit.
acceptance_criteria: Contract-bound quantile run fails closed before train/export/registry when PIT manifest is missing, invalid, pooled, candidate-scope mismatched, unpinned, leakage-prone, or legacy-scorer routed.
Successful contract-bound run emits canonical pit_dataset_manifest and training_pit_manifest_binding_v1 in the acceptance report.
Non-contract-bound run remains backward compatible and explicitly records not_contract_bound binding.
PIT sidecar and acceptance report persistence avoid partial final artifacts by same-directory temp write plus atomic replace.
Focused and adjacent source tests pass and no runtime/loss-control branch is consumed.
